world.title: US-Israel-Iran War Live: Lebanon accuses Israel of ceasefire violations, calls it acts of aggression
world.description: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: A 10-day truce came into effect in Lebanon on Friday, aimed at pausing fighting between Israel and the Hezbollah militant group and supporting efforts to extend a broader ceasefire involving Iran, US and Israel after weeks of intense conflict. However, Lebanon’s army said Israel carried out “acts of aggression” that it described as violations of the ceasefire, which took effect at midnight local time. However, the situation on the ground remains uncertain, with Hezbollah indicating that its participation in any truce depends on Israel halting all forms of hostilities. Meanwhile, the humanitarian toll continues to rise, with Lebanon’s National News Agency reporting 2,196 deaths and 7,185 injuries from ongoing Israeli attacks. Additionally, US President Donald Trump said a deal to end the war with Iran was “very close” and suggested talks could resume in Islamabad as early as this weekend. Follow indiatoday.in for live updates.

science.title: A “death” protein may be the key to slowing aging at its source
science.description: Scientists have discovered that a protein linked to cell death is secretly driving the aging of blood stem cells in a completely different way. Instead of killing the cells, it damages their mitochondria, sapping their energy and weakening the immune system over time. When this protein was turned off, stem cells remained stronger and more balanced, even under stress. The findings point to a new strategy for slowing aging at its source.
